title: UltimateFistRecreation
description: UltimateFist rebuilt for Alpha 1.0.16–1.1.0, no ModLoader needed
body:
# UltimateFist (Alpha Rebuild) no modloader needed

A base‑edit recreation of Zaraza107’s UltimateFist mod from the beloved Z Mod heptalogy.

Back in Minecraft’s early days, UltimateFist became a cult favorite among players who wanted to tear through the world at lightning speed. With a single punch, entire walls crumbled, mountains vanished, and mining became almost instant. It was chaotic, it was fun, and it was pure sandbox power.

However, for many Alpha versions, the original mod is locked behind Risugami’s ModLoader — a dependency that simply doesn’t exist for certain builds.

### ⚡ What’s New in This Rebuild

This project is a from‑scratch recreation of the UltimateFist mod without modloader dependency, carefully adapted for:

- Minecraft Alpha v1.0.16
- Minecraft Alpha v1.0.17_02 to v1.0.17_04
- Minecraft Alpha v1.1.0
- _…and more versions to come_


### Features:
-     Instant block destruction
-     One‑shot kills on monsters
-     No ModLoader required

![Showing the crafting recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/758be01ab969cf63e71902192ee07fb331363caa.png)

### 🎥 Showcase Video: 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WGhbzn0OLlk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 📦 Installation

The usual stuff for base edit mods. Go to your .minecraft/versions/<version>/ folder or otherwise depending on your launcher.
The <version> should match the Minecraft Alpha build you’re installing the mod for. Use an archive program such as 7‑Zip or WinRAR to open the unmodified minecraft.jar and remove the META‑INF folder by deleting it. 

Afterwards add the mod files by opening the mod's .zip archive with an archive program. Drag and drop all files from the mod archive into the open minecraft.jar window. Overwrite files if prompted. Save and close the archive. Start Minecraft Alpha and enjoy your new UltimateFist powers.

Use a archive programm to open your unmodded minecraft.jar located in '.minecraft/versions/<version>/' depending on your launcher. Delete the META-INF folder and put the files from the mods .zip archive in there.

### 🔧 Technical Details

For the ultimate fist tool itself item id '20300' in order to keep compatibilitiy with _TheZygas's ultimate tool mod for minecraft alpha 'v1.1.2_01'_.

Minecraft Alpha shifts all internal IDs by +256 before accessing them. This means the UltimateFist item appears as 20556 in the ntb data for inventories or chest of worlds.

Uses the original pre‑retexture artwork (before Captain Crazy’s update), located at slot 150 in gui/item.png inside minecraft.jar.

If you want texture packs to work with the item, Place the texture in the same location (item.png) within your texture pack.

Pixel coordinates: (96,144) to (111,159).

### 📜 Credits & References

Archives of the original mod can be found here:
1. [[MOD] The Z Mods (MC 1.2.6 compatible!)](https://web.archive.org/web/20110903041643/http://www.minecraftforum.net/topic/83660-mod-the-z-mods-mc-126-compatible/)
2. [2010's original Drop Box index for UltimateFist](https://web.archive.org/web/20141214162437/https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/u/20629262/index.html)
